decisions.decision: Edit popup must pass toolType + initialWallHeight for wall markups
decisions.rationale: MarkupNamePopup wall-height row is conditional on toolType==='wall' — any callsite omitting toolType silently drops the row. Fixed in 224f867. Pattern: always pass toolType when opening MarkupNamePopup in mode='edit'.
